Package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi

Class JsonApiError

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi.JsonApiError
@Marshalled public class JsonApiError extends Object
Represents a JSON:API Error Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Error Objects.
See Also:
  • juneau-bean-jsonapi

    • getLinks

      @BeanProp("links") @Swap(JsonApiLinkOrStringSwap.class) public Map<String,Object> getLinks()
      Bean property getter: links.

      Per spec, each links value can be either a JSON string URL or a JsonApiLink object.

      Returns:
      The value of the links property, or null if it is not set.
